title: Atoz Wooden Classics Farm Animals Puzzle, 18cm x 18cm, Educational Toy for 12+ Months
features: EDUCATIONAL DESIGN: Chunky wooden farm animal puzzle featuring five adorable farmyard characters - cow, sheep, pig, rooster and dog - perfect for little hands
SIZE AND MATERIAL: Compact 18cm x 18cm wooden puzzle board with colourful, raised pieces made from durable, child-safe materials
AGE SUITABILITY: Specially designed for children aged 12 months and up, helping develop fine motor skills and animal recognition
LEARNING FEATURES: Each piece sits in its own designated spot on the beautifully illustrated farmyard background, encouraging spatial awareness and problem-solving
VISUAL ENGAGEMENT: Bright, cheerful colours and friendly animal designs create an engaging learning experience while introducing farm animals to toddlers
description: Introduce your little one to the delightful world of farm animals with this charming wooden puzzle! Perfect for children aged 12 months and up, this 18cm x 18cm puzzle features five adorable farm friends - a spotted cow, fluffy sheep, cheerful rooster, playful pig, and friendly rabbit. Each chunky piece is specially designed for tiny hands to grasp and manipulate easily, helping develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. The bright, vibrant colours and sweet animal characters set against a farm backdrop create an engaging scene that sparks imagination and encourages vocabulary development. This Wooden Classics puzzle provides an excellent opportunity for parents to teach animal names, sounds, and basic farm concepts while little ones enjoy the satisfaction of matching pieces to their correct spots. The durable wooden construction ensures this puzzle will withstand countless play sessions as your child grows and learns. A wonderful first puzzle that combines learning with play, making it an ideal educational toy for toddlers taking their first steps into the world of problem-solving.
